canonical_name: the captain of the King's horse
a sour old man too lame to fight
the king wounded in the thigh
some youth comes who can make it spring fertile anew
a wife who could give him a child
a notable mistress of healing arts
the son of Igraine's own sister
a young king who has need of his old harper to play and cheer his soul
the one who so did the will of heaven
the closest of kinsmen to me
one who was of Uther Pendragon's blood
